channel.title: HoldLens — What to buy (Q4 2025)
channel.description: Top buy signals from the best portfolio managers in the world — ranked by HoldLens's multi-factor recommendation model. Updated every 13F filing deadline.

item.title: META buy signal — 100/100 · 9 managers buying
item.description: Stephen Mandel, John Armitage, François Rochon, Li Lu, Joel Greenblatt, Andreas Halvorsen, Jeffrey Ubben, Lee Ainslie, Chase Coleman are buying META (Meta Platforms) this quarter. Multi-factor recommendation score: 100/100. Quality-weighted buyer list: Stephen Mandel (Q9), John Armitage (Q9), François Rochon (Q9), Li Lu (Q8), Joel Greenblatt (Q8), Andreas Halvorsen (Q8), Jeffrey Ubben (Q8), Lee Ainslie (Q8), Chase Coleman (Q8).

item.title: MSFT buy signal — 54/100 · 3 managers buying
item.description: Terry Smith, John Armitage, Andreas Halvorsen are buying MSFT (Microsoft) this quarter. Multi-factor recommendation score: 54/100. Quality-weighted buyer list: Terry Smith (Q9), John Armitage (Q9), Andreas Halvorsen (Q8).

item.title: NVDA buy signal — 53/100 · 3 managers buying
item.description: David Tepper, Andreas Halvorsen, Tom Slater are buying NVDA (NVIDIA) this quarter. Multi-factor recommendation score: 53/100. Quality-weighted buyer list: David Tepper (Q9), Andreas Halvorsen (Q8), Tom Slater (Q8).

item.description: John Armitage, Glenn Greenberg are buying SCHW (Charles Schwab) this quarter. Multi-factor recommendation score: 52/100. Quality-weighted buyer list: John Armitage (Q9), Glenn Greenberg (Q7).

item.description: David Tepper, Bill Ackman are buying UBER (Uber) this quarter. Multi-factor recommendation score: 43/100. Quality-weighted buyer list: David Tepper (Q9), Bill Ackman (Q8).
